'''pazhojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xor|xor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-zh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xor|xor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pazhojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzhejeth|pæzhejeth]] || [[word:pæzhejej|pæzhejej]] || [[word:pæzhejesh|pæzhejesh]] || [[word:pæzheje|pæzheje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazhozhojoth|pazhozhojoth]] || [[word:pazhozhojoj|pazhozhojoj]] || [[word:pazhozhojosh|pazhozhojosh]] || [[word:pazhozhojo|pazhozhojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazhojoth|pazhojoth]] || [[word:pazhojoj|pazhojoj]] || [[word:pazhojosh|pazhojosh]] || [[word:pazhojo|pazhojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazhofjoth|pazhofjoth]] || [[word:pazhofjoj|pazhofjoj]] || [[word:pazhofjosh|pazhofjosh]] || [[word:pazhofjof|pazhofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazhojotho|pazhojotho]] || [[word:pazhojojo|pazhojojo]] || [[word:pazhojosho|pazhojosho]] || [[word:pazhojoko|pazhojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazhojoth|pazhojoth]] || [[word:pazhojoj|pazhojoj]] || [[word:pazhojosh|pazhojosh]] || [[word:pazhojo|pazhojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazhojothol|pazhojothol]] || [[word:pazhojojol|pazhojojol]] || [[word:pazhojoshol|pazhojoshol]] || [[word:pazhojokol|pazhojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazhojothotho|pazhojothotho]] || [[word:pazhojojojo|pazhojojojo]] || [[word:pazhojoshosho|pazhojoshosho]] || [[word:pazhojoko|pazhojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazhojothon|pazhojothon]] || [[word:pazhojojon|pazhojojon]] || [[word:pazhojoshon|pazhojoshon]] || [[word:pazhojokon|pazhojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazhojothoro|pazhojothoro]] || [[word:pazhojojoro|pazhojojoro]] || [[word:pazhojoshoro|pazhojoshoro]] || [[word:pazhojokoro|pazhojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
